info.title: Welcome to the Ǝmball Pit
info.description: You've found the best place on the internet for Eminem edits, remasters, leaks, and community discussion. Below you'll find everything you need to get started.
info.footer: Use /archive to grab any song · DMs open for remaster requests

sections.name: 🎙️ Archive Command
sections.value:
The archive is the heart of the bot — instant access to the complete Eminem catalogue in FLAC or MP3, sent straight to your DMs.

**`/archive [flac/mp3] [song title] [version (optional)]`**
```
/archive flac antichrist 2005 version
/archive mp3 mockingbird
/archive flac lose yourself instrumental
```

sections.name: 💸 Paid Remaster Requests
sections.value: I also do paid remaster requests for **$10**. If you want a song remastered, DM me.

commands.title: Bot Commands
commands.footer: Slash commands only · responses are ephemeral where noted

sections.name: 🗂️ /archive
sections.value:
`/archive [flac/mp3] [title] [version?]`
Retrieve any song from the complete Eminem catalogue. Sent to your DMs. Version is optional — use it for live recordings, instrumentals, demos, remixes, etc.
```
/archive flac antichrist 2005 version
/archive mp3  mockingbird
/archive flac lose yourself instrumental
```

sections.name: 🎙️ Voice Messages
sections.value:
`/vmtranscribe disable` — Stop the bot auto-transcribing your VMs.
`/vmtranscribe enable` — Turn auto-transcription back on.
`/vmstats` — Stats and fun facts about the server's VM archive.

sections.name: 🏆 Community & XP
sections.value:
`/xp [@member?]` — Check your XP or another member's.
`/leaderboard` — Top 10 XP rankings.
`/submission_info [message_id]` — Look up a community submission.

sections.name: 🎵 Music Player
sections.value:
`/play [url/query]` — Play audio in your voice channel.
`/pause` · `/resume` · `/skip` · `/stop` · `/leave`
`/queue` — View the current queue.
`/loop` — Toggle looping.

sections.name: 📜 Other
sections.value:
`/rules` — View the server rules.
`?archive` · `?tracker` · `?edits` · `?tips` — Quick links (type in any channel).
